title: Loyalty Medals
description: Getting rewarded for being a dedicated player.
body:
This mod adds Loyalty Medals, these are purely decorative aesthetic things and are only accessible by a few ways. 1. The /give command 2. Playing on a server or world for X amount of time
Upon first joining the world or server you will get your first loyalty advancement, this one is simply for being there.
All the other medals will be granted by playing for X amount of hours, this starts with 5 hours and currently goes up to 300 hours
There are 10 Medals in the game right now:
  • 5 hours: Wooden Loyalty Medal
  • 10 hours: Bronze Loyalty Medal
  • 20 hours: Silver Loyalty Medal
  • 40 hours: Gold Loyalty Medal
And so on... don't want to spill the whole mod yet ;) These Medals can be worn in your bauble slot or can be shown off via item frames.

Need a server? Get 20% off your first month by using promo code "mrbysco"

For questions feel free to join my Discord. ## Want to support us? ##

  -Mrbysco
